title: Nord (disambiguation)
content:
'''Nord''' could refer to one of the following:

==[[In-universe]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Nord (Imperial)|Nord]]''', a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]]
*'''[[Nord (Rebel)|Nord]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]]
*'''[[Calo Nord]]''', a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]
*'''[[Dren Nord]]''', a Rebel Alliance [[Doctor/Legends|surgeon]]

===Other===
*'''[[Grand Nord]]''', [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Karlatt]]
*The '''[[Nord]]''', a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]
*The '''[[Nord system/Legends|Nord system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*The '''[[NordFeed]]''', a communications network on the planet [[Nordra]]

==Real life==
*'''[[Cary Nord]]''', penciller of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[Ghosts of Hoth]]"

{{Disambig}}

|de=Nord
}}
